how.title: How it works
how.text: No cart, account, or long forms. Everything happens in the messenger that is easiest for you.

steps.title: Send VIN or vehicle model
steps.text: You can add a part photo, part number, or a short issue description.

steps.title: We match available options
steps.text: We check compatibility and suggest parts that are available.

steps.title: You choose brand and budget
steps.text: We explain the difference between original, OEM, and analog options.

steps.title: We ship across Ukraine
steps.text: We confirm delivery details and hand the order to Nova Poshta.

budget.title: Options for different budgets
budget.text: For most parts we can offer several solutions: from original parts to reliable budget analogs.

items.title: Original
items.text: Original parts for maximum alignment with manufacturer requirements.

items.title: OEM / Premium Analog
items.text: A strong balance of durability, brand trust, and price for everyday use.

items.title: Budget Analog
items.text: An accessible option when you need to solve the problem without overpaying.

delivery.title: Delivery and payment
delivery.text: Before shipping, we confirm compatibility, payment method, and the most convenient branch or delivery address.

items.title: Delivery across Ukraine
items.text: We work with customers in every region where delivery is available.

items.title: Nova Poshta
items.text: We ship to branches, parcel lockers, or by courier.

items.title: Pay on delivery
items.text: Cash on delivery is available by agreement.

items.title: Pre-purchase consultation
items.text: We help compare brands and confirm compatibility.

items.title: Compatibility check
items.text: We verify vehicle, year, engine, and VIN before recommending a part.

faq.title: Questions about auto parts matching
faq.text: These answers help you understand the process quickly and prepare the details a manager needs.

items.question: How do I match a part by VIN?
items.answer: Send your VIN code in Telegram, Viber, or WhatsApp. We will check the vehicle configuration, verify compatibility, and suggest available part options.

items.question: Can I order without a part number?
items.answer: Yes. If you do not have a number, send the make, model, year, engine, or a photo of the part. That is often enough to start matching.

items.question: Do you deliver across Ukraine?
items.answer: Yes, we ship auto parts across Ukraine via Nova Poshta to branches, parcel lockers, or courier delivery where available.

items.question: Can I pay on delivery?
items.answer: In many cases, payment on delivery is available. A manager will confirm the terms after matching the specific item and delivery cost.

items.question: How do I know the part will fit?
items.answer: We check compatibility by VIN, vehicle parameters, cross-numbers, and technical specifications. If anything is unclear, we will ask for an extra photo or details.

items.question: Do you sell original parts or analogs?
items.answer: We can offer original parts, OEM parts, or quality analogs. You choose the option that best matches price, brand, and expected durability.

finalCta.title: Need a part?
finalCta.text: Message us and we will match the right part for your vehicle.

footer.description: Premium auto parts matching without extra forms: consultation, compatibility checks, and delivery across Ukraine.
